title: [ExportVerilog] Fix output port symbols not interpolating properly
body: Fix an issue in `ExportVerilog` where `hw.exportPort` symbols on output ports of a module would not be properly interpolated into `sv.verbatim` operations. This commit fixes the issue by adding the output ports to the symbol cache, and changing the interpolation of port symbols to rely on the `getPortVerilogName()` function of the `GlobalNameTable`. This has the benefit of beign consistent with the corresponding module (name collisions are resolved), and that no `BlockArgument` is required to get a hold of the output port name.
